mapper.select: SELECT cr.id, c.course_name, cr.class_name, cr.student_count, cr.semester, cr.status, t.id AS teacher_id, t.real_name AS teacher_name, t.avatar_url AS teacher_avatar, s.id AS student_id, s.real_name AS student_name, cs.student_no, cg.group_name FROM class_room cr INNER JOIN course c ON c.id = cr.course_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_user t ON t.id = cr.teacher_id LEFT JOIN class_student cs ON cs.class_id = cr.id AND cs.status = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON s.id = cs.student_id LEFT JOIN class_group_student cgs ON cgs.student_id = s.id AND cgs.class_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN class_group cg ON cg.id = cgs.group_id AND cg.group_type = 'CLASS' WHERE cr.id = #{classId} AND cr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cs.joined_at ASC
